app.csv_empty: CSV file is empty or invalid
app.delete_confirm:
Delete "{name}"?

This action is permanent (cannot be undone).
app.delete_confirm_children:
Delete "{name}"?

⚠️ {count} children will lose parent link.
This action is permanent (cannot be undone).
app.force_pwd_weak: Weak password. Please review requirements above.
app.import_confirm:
Importing data from file will OVERWRITE all current data.
Are you sure?
app.load_tree_error: Error loading family tree from server. Please check your network connection.
app.login_success_reset: Login successful from link. Please change your password.
app.no_add_permission: Only Editors or Admins can add new members.
app.no_delete_permission: Only Editors or Admins can delete members.
app.no_import_permission: Only Editors or Admins can import data.
app.offline_warning: Cannot connect to server. Displaying offline family tree. Please check your network connection.
app.reset_confirm:
Restore sample data?

⚠️ All changes will be lost!
contacts.header_desc: Connect quickly with official family information channels.
dashboard.feature_calendar_desc: Track upcoming death anniversaries, birthdays, and common events.
dashboard.feature_chat_desc: Instant messaging, photo sharing, and voice/video calls.
dashboard.feature_finance_desc: Manage contributions and transparent income/expense reports of the family.
dashboard.feature_guide_desc: How to use the family tree, create chats, and manage the family fund.
dashboard.feature_newsfeed_desc: Update news, activities, and important announcements from the family.
dashboard.feature_tree_desc: Explore the genealogy tree, trace origins and family branches.
dashboard.welcome_subtitle: Welcome back to the digital space of the Vu Family.
guide.calendar_desc: Track memorial days, holidays, and birthdays.
guide.calendar_f1: Calendar auto-displays all birthdays (solar) and memorial days (lunar/solar) of family members.
guide.calendar_f2: Click on a highlighted date to view the detailed event list for that day.
guide.calendar_f3: Never miss important family anniversaries or memorial days.
guide.chat_f1: Instant messaging (Real-time Chat) with any member or in the family group chat.
guide.chat_f2: Send images, files and emojis quickly.
guide.chat_f3: Press 📞 (Voice Call) or 📹 (Video Call) in the chat header for free, high-quality direct calls.
guide.chat_f4: When someone calls, a ringing screen will appear — you can answer or decline easily.
guide.newsfeed_desc: Digital social space for the family, like an internal social network.
guide.newsfeed_f1: Post important announcements, share good news, and greetings to the entire family.
guide.newsfeed_f2: Click "Like", "Heart", "Haha"... and leave comments to interact with others' posts.
guide.newsfeed_f3: View the list of members with upcoming birthdays on the right side to send early wishes.
guide.newsfeed_f4: Switch to "Contacts" tab to quickly access Zalo/Facebook/Phone of family members.
guide.page_desc: Explore features and learn how to use the professional Digital Family Tree system.
guide.requests_a1: Administrators and Editors can edit directly without approval.
guide.requests_a2: The "Edit Requests" tab will show a red badge when there are pending proposals. Go there to Accept or Reject.
guide.requests_f1: Users with "Viewer" role cannot edit data directly to prevent accidental damage to the tree.
guide.requests_f2: If you find incorrect info or want to add someone, click "Update" → fill in details and "Send Request".
guide.requests_f3: Administrators will receive your request notification and will review and approve it to apply changes.
guide.tree_a1: Click "Update" in the detail panel to edit member information.
guide.tree_a2: "Add child" / "Add spouse" buttons to expand the family branch.
guide.tree_a3: Changes will be applied immediately to the system.
guide.tree_desc: The heart of the system, displaying the entire family genealogy.
guide.tree_f1: Swipe, drag and zoom to view the entire family tree overview.
guide.tree_f2: Click on a member's avatar to view their detailed information (date of birth, occupation, address...).
guide.tree_f3: Use the toolbar on the right side of the screen to zoom in, zoom out, or auto-fit the chart.
guide.tree_f4: Click the "Search members..." box on the navigation bar to quickly search by name or occupation.
history.revert_unavailable: Revert is not supported on the online system.
history.subtitle: Track changes to family tree data
newsfeed.title: Family Newsfeed
newsfeed.header_desc: Announcements, updates, and internal sharing of the Vu family.
